name: Switch
searchText: switch capture boolean input from user @mantine/core /core/switch color description error id label labelposition offlabel onlabel radius rootref size thumbicon withthumbindicator wrapperprops

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set input color in checked state

props.name: id
props.description: Id used to bind input and label, if not passed, unique id will be generated instead

props.name: label
props.description: Content of the label associated with the switch

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Position of the label relative to the input

props.name: offLabel
props.description: Inner label when the Switch is in unchecked state

props.name: onLabel
props.description: Inner label when the Switch is in checked state

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: rootRef
props.description: Assigns ref of the root element

props.name: thumbIcon
props.description: Icon inside the thumb of the switch

props.name: withThumbIndicator
props.description: If set, displays a colored dot inside the thumb that matches the track background color

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element
